name: Cycling Track UAE - Ride & Recharge at Masaar Track, Sharjah
snippet:
Explore Masaar Track, a 6.6 km cycling track in Sharjah, UAE, perfect for cyclists of all levels with 24/7 access, lighting, underpasses, and a bridge. Missing: details | Show results with: details
Get into shape at this 6.6 kilometre looped circuit, which runs through the woodland at on the outskirts of the Masaar master community. Featuring three underpasses and one bridge, the circuit has been carefully designed with both amateur and professional cyclists in mind.

name: Cycling in one of the greenest corners in the UAE. A full 6.5 km loop
snippet: A full 6.5 km loop wrapped in lush greenery, calm trails and a perfect full circle. You can bring your own bike or rent it for AED 50 an hour. Missing: Al Suyoh details
